name: scripts/docx_cli.sh
description: Wrapper for the minimax-docx dotnet CLI. Supports create / edit / apply-template / analyze / validate / diff / fix-order / merge-runs commands.

_args.description: CLI args passed directly to the dotnet CLI. First element must be a command: create | edit | apply-template | analyze | validate | diff | fix-order | merge-runs. For 'create': include --output <file> --title <title> --page-size a4. Do NOT include --content-json here; pass content via the 'content' property instead.

content.description: Document body content for 'create' command. Passed via stdin and auto-injected as --content-json. Use 'sections' array for structured content.

sections.description: Array of document sections. Each section can have: heading (str), level (1-6), paragraphs (str[]), table ({headers, rows}), items (str[]), list_style ('bullet'|'numbered'), sections (nested).

name: scripts/doc_to_docx.sh
description: Convert legacy .doc files to .docx via LibreOffice

name: scripts/docx_preview.sh
description: Preview DOCX content as plain text
